
What can I help you with today?


<!DOCTYPE html> <html lang="tr"> <head> <meta charset="UTF-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0"> <title>ceyrax</title> <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=

pasted


kodu incele

Claude is AI and can make mistakes. Please double-check responses.

Pasted content
1.94 MB •556 lines
•
Formatting may be inconsistent from source


<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>ceyrax</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Syncopate:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#07080c;
  --gold:#c9a84c;
  --gold2:#f0d080;
  --silver:#8899b4;
  --white:#eef2ff;
  --dim:#1a1f2e;
  --border:rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
  --border2:rgba(201,168,76,0.08);
}

/* ARKA PLAN GIF */
html,body{
  width:100%;height:100%;
  background: var(--bg) url('data:image/gif;base64,...(base64 çok uzun olduğu için burada kesildi, orijinal base64'i olduğu gibi yapıştırın)')) no-repeat center center fixed;
  background-size: cover;
  color:var(--white);font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',Georgia,serif;overflow:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased
}

canvas{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none;opacity:0.85}

/* Diğer stiller aynı kalıyor... */
.intro-brand{
  font-family:'Syncopate',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(2rem,8vw,5rem);
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:12px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold2) 0%,var(--gold) 50%,var(--gold2) 100%);
  background-size:200% 200%;
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  animation:shimmer 4s ease-in-out infinite, fadeIn .8s ease both;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}

/* Font iyileştirmeleri */
.home-title, .p-title, .nav-brand {
  font-family: 'Syncopate', 'Impact', sans-serif;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.about-p, .home-desc, .contact-p {
  font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', Georgia, serif;
  font-weight: 300;
}

.tag, .tech, .ntab, .soc-name, .sk-name {
  font-family: 'Space Mono', 'Consolas', monospace;
}

/* Kalan tüm stiller (orijinal kodunuzdaki stil bloğunun geri kalanı) */
.intro-lines{...} /* ... tüm stil bloğunuzu buraya kopyalayın */
</style>
</head>
<body>

<canvas id="cv"></canvas>

<!-- Geri kalan HTML içeriğiniz (intro, site, script vs.) tamamen aynı kalıyor -->
<!-- Sadece body'nin en üstüne canvas ve stil değişiklikleri eklendi -->

</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0">
<title>ceyrax</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;0,600;1,300;1,400&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&family=Syncopate:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#07080c;
  --gold:#c9a84c;
  --gold2:#f0d080;
  --silver:#8899b4;
  --white:#eef2ff;
  --dim:#1a1f2e;
  --border:rgba(201,168,76,0.2);
  --border2:rgba(201,168,76,0.08);
}
html,body{width:100%;height:100%;background:var(--bg);color:var(--white);font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',serif;overflow:hidden;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased}
canvas{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:0;pointer-events:none}

/* ─── INTRO SCREEN ─── */
#intro{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  background:var(--bg);
  transition:opacity .8s ease, visibility .8s ease;
}
#intro.hidden{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none}

.intro-lines{
  position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    linear-gradient(rgba(201,168,76,.04) 1px,transparent 1px),
    linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(201,168,76,.04) 1px,transparent 1px);
  background-size:60px 60px;
}
.intro-corner{position:absolute;width:32px;height:32px;opacity:.4}
.intro-corner.tl{top:24px;left:24px;border-top:1px solid var(--gold);border-left:1px solid var(--gold)}
.intro-corner.tr{top:24px;right:24px;border-top:1px solid var(--gold);border-right:1px solid var(--gold)}
.intro-corner.bl{bottom:24px;left:24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold);border-left:1px solid var(--gold)}
.intro-corner.br{bottom:24px;right:24px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold);border-right:1px solid var(--gold)}

.intro-brand{
  font-family:'Syncopate',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(2rem,8vw,5rem);
  font-weight:700;
  letter-spacing:12px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold2) 0%,var(--gold) 50%,var(--gold2) 100%);
  background-size:200% 200%;
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  animation:shimmer 4s ease-in-out infinite, fadeIn .8s ease both;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}
@keyframes shimmer{0%,100%{background-position:0% 50%}50%{background-position:100% 50%}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(20px)}to{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0)}}

.intro-line-sep{
  width:1px;height:0;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);
  margin:0 auto;
  animation:grow-line .8s .4s ease forwards;
}
@keyframes grow-line{to{height:60px}}

.intro-sub{
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:5px;
  color:var(--silver);text-transform:uppercase;
  opacity:0;
  animation:fadeIn .8s .5s ease forwards;
  margin-top:12px;margin-bottom:56px;
}

/* THE BUTTON */
.enter-btn{
  position:relative;
  font-family:'Syncopate',sans-serif;
  font-size:.75rem;letter-spacing:5px;
  text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--bg);
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold2),var(--gold));
  border:none;
  padding:20px 52px;
  cursor:pointer;
  opacity:0;
  animation:fadeIn .8s .8s ease forwards;
  transition:transform .3s, box-shadow .3s;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.enter-btn::before{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,255,255,.3),transparent);
  transform:translateX(-100%);
  transition:transform .6s;
}
.enter-btn:hover{
  transform:scale(1.03);
  box-shadow:0 0 60px rgba(201,168,76,.5),0 0 120px rgba(201,168,76,.15);
}
.enter-btn:hover::before{transform:translateX(100%)}
.enter-btn:active{transform:scale(.98)}

.intro-particles{
  position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;
}
.ipar{
  position:absolute;
  width:2px;height:2px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--gold);
  animation:ipar-float linear infinite;
  opacity:0;
}
@keyframes ipar-float{
  0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(100vh) scale(0)}
  10%{opacity:.6}
  90%{opacity:.3}
  100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-20px) scale(1.5)}
}

/* ─── MAIN SITE ─── */
#site{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:50;
  opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;
  transition:opacity .8s .3s ease, visibility .8s .3s ease;
}
#site.visible{opacity:1;visibility:visible;pointer-events:all}

/* TOP NAV */
.topnav{
  position:fixed;top:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:200;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:0 48px;height:64px;
  background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(7,8,12,.95),transparent);
  backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border2);
}
.nav-brand{
  font-family:'Syncopate',sans-serif;
  font-size:.7rem;letter-spacing:6px;
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold2),var(--gold));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.nav-tabs{display:flex;gap:0}
.ntab{
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.55rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--silver);
  background:none;border:none;
  padding:0 22px;height:64px;
  cursor:pointer;
  transition:color .3s;
  position:relative;
}
.ntab::after{
  content:'';
  position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;
  background:var(--gold);
  transform:scaleX(0);transition:transform .3s;
}
.ntab:hover,.ntab.active{color:var(--gold)}
.ntab.active::after{transform:scaleX(1)}

/* MUSIC INDICATOR */
.music-ind{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--gold);
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .5s;
}
.music-ind.on{opacity:1}
.mbars{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:2px;height:14px}
.mbar{width:2px;border-radius:1px;background:var(--gold);animation:mb 1.2s ease-in-out infinite}
.mbar:nth-child(1){animation-delay:0s}
.mbar:nth-child(2){animation-delay:.2s}
.mbar:nth-child(3){animation-delay:.1s}
@keyframes mb{0%,100%{height:3px}50%{height:13px}}

/* PANELS */
.main-wrap{
  position:fixed;inset:64px 0 0;
  overflow:hidden;
}
.panel{
  position:absolute;inset:0;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;
  padding:48px 80px;
  opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;
  transform:translateX(20px);
  transition:all .5s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  overflow-y:auto;
}
.panel.active{opacity:1;visibility:visible;pointer-events:all;transform:translateX(0)}

/* ── HOME ── */
.home-eyebrow{
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;
  font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--gold);
  text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:32px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;
}
.eline{height:1px;width:32px;background:var(--gold);opacity:.5}
.home-title{
  font-size:clamp(3.5rem,8vw,7rem);
  font-weight:300;line-height:.9;
  letter-spacing:-2px;
  margin-bottom:12px;
}
.home-title em{
  font-style:italic;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold2),var(--gold));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.hdiv{width:48px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),transparent);margin:28px 0}
.home-desc{
  font-size:1.15rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1.9;
  color:rgba(238,242,255,.55);max-width:460px;margin-bottom:40px;
}
.home-desc strong{color:var(--gold);font-weight:400}
.tag-row{display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap}
.tag{
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.55rem;letter-spacing:2px;
  padding:9px 18px;border:1px solid var(--border2);
  color:var(--silver);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);
  transition:all .3s;cursor:default;
}
.tag:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold)}

/* glitch */
.glitch{position:relative;display:inline-block}
.glitch::before,.glitch::after{
  content:attr(data-t);position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;
  font-style:italic;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold2),var(--gold));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
  animation:glt 6s infinite;
}
.glitch::before{clip-path:polygon(0 20%,100% 20%,100% 40%,0 40%);animation-delay:-.5s}
.glitch::after{clip-path:polygon(0 65%,100% 65%,100% 82%,0 82%);animation-delay:-1.2s}
@keyframes glt{0%,88%,100%{transform:translate(0);opacity:0}90%{transform:translate(-3px,1px);opacity:.9}93%{transform:translate(3px,-1px);opacity:.9}96%{opacity:0}}

/* ── SERVICES ── */
.p-title{
  font-family:'Syncopate',sans-serif;
  font-size:clamp(1.2rem,3vw,1.8rem);
  letter-spacing:4px;font-weight:400;
  color:var(--white);margin-bottom:8px;
}
.p-sub{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.55rem;letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--silver);margin-bottom:40px;opacity:.5}
.srv-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);gap:1px;
  background:var(--border2);border:1px solid var(--border2);
  max-width:800px;
}
.srv{background:rgba(7,8,12,.98);padding:28px 24px;transition:background .3s;cursor:default}
.srv:hover{background:#0c0e15}
.srv-icon{font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:16px;display:block}
.srv-name{
  font-family:'Syncopate',sans-serif;font-size:.65rem;
  letter-spacing:3px;color:var(--white);margin-bottom:10px;
}
.srv-text{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:300;color:rgba(238,242,255,.45);line-height:1.8}
.srv-tech{margin-top:16px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--gold);opacity:.65}

/* ── ABOUT ── */
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:64px;align-items:start;max-width:900px}
.about-p{font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:300;line-height:2;color:rgba(238,242,255,.6);margin-bottom:20px}
.about-p strong{color:var(--gold);font-weight:400}
.stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);border:1px solid var(--border2);margin-top:32px}
.stat{padding:20px 0;text-align:center;border-right:1px solid var(--border2)}
.stat:last-child{border-right:none}
.stat-n{
  font-size:2rem;font-weight:300;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold2),var(--gold));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.stat-l{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.45rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--silver);margin-top:4px;opacity:.45;text-transform:uppercase}
.sk-rows{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:22px}
.sk-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px}
.sk-name{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--white)}
.sk-pct{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;color:var(--gold)}
.sk-bar{height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);position:relative}
.sk-fill{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--gold),var(--gold2));width:0;transition:width 1.4s cubic-bezier(.19,1,.22,1)}
.sk-fill::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:0;top:50%;transform:translate(50%,-50%);width:4px;height:4px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold2);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--gold2)}

/* ── STACK ── */
.tech-cloud{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;max-width:640px}
.tech{
  font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:2px;
  padding:10px 18px;border:1px solid var(--border2);
  color:var(--silver);background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);
  transition:all .35s;cursor:default;
}
.tech:hover{border-color:var(--gold);color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,.04);transform:translateY(-2px)}

/* ── CONTACT ── */
.contact-wrap{max-width:500px}
.contact-p{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:300;line-height:2;color:rgba(238,242,255,.55);margin-bottom:40px}
.contact-p strong{color:var(--gold);font-weight:400}
.soc-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px}
.soc-link{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:16px;
  padding:16px 22px;
  border:1px solid var(--border2);
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.02);
  text-decoration:none;color:var(--white);
  transition:all .35s;
}
.soc-link:hover{border-color:var(--gold);background:rgba(201,168,76,.04);transform:translateX(6px)}
.soc-icon{width:32px;height:32px;border:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;flex-shrink:0;transition:border-color .35s}
.soc-link:hover .soc-icon{border-color:var(--gold)}
.soc-name{font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.6rem;letter-spacing:3px;text-transform:uppercase}
.soc-handle{margin-left:auto;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.58rem;color:var(--gold);opacity:.65;letter-spacing:1px}

/* STATUS */
.status{position:fixed;bottom:20px;right:24px;z-index:300;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.5rem;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--silver)}
.sdot{width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#4ade80;box-shadow:0 0 8px #4ade80;animation:blink 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.3}}

/* MOBILE */
@media(max-width:680px){
  html,body{overflow:auto}
  .topnav{padding:0 16px}
  .ntab{padding:0 12px;font-size:.48rem;letter-spacing:2px}
  .panel{padding:32px 20px;position:relative;inset:unset;min-height:calc(100vh - 64px);overflow-y:auto}
  .main-wrap{position:relative;inset:unset;overflow:visible}
  #site{position:relative;inset:unset;overflow:visible}
  .home-title{font-size:3rem}
  .srv-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:32px}
  .panel.active{transform:none}
  .status{display:none}
  .music-ind span:last-child{display:none}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<canvas id="cv"></canvas>

<!-- ─── INTRO ─── -->
<div id="intro">
  <div class="intro-lines"></div>
  <div class="intro-particles" id="ipar"></div>
  <div class="intro-corner tl"></div>
  <div class="intro-corner tr"></div>
  <div class="intro-corner bl"></div>
  <div class="intro-corner br"></div>

  <div class="intro-brand">Ceyrax</div>
  <div class="intro-line-sep"></div>
  <div class="intro-sub">Developer &amp; Creator</div>

  <button class="enter-btn" id="enterBtn">Ceyrax Kimdir?</button>
</div>

<!-- ─── SITE ─── -->
<div id="site">

  <nav class="topnav">
    <div class="nav-brand">Ceyrax</div>
    <div class="nav-tabs">
      <button class="ntab active" data-p="home">Ana Sayfa</button>
      <button class="ntab" data-p="services">Hizmetler</button>
      <button class="ntab" data-p="about">Hakkımda</button>
      <button class="ntab" data-p="stack">Stack</button>
      <button class="ntab" data-p="contact">İletişim</button>
    </div>
    <div class="music-ind" id="mInd">
      <div class="mbars"><div class="mbar"></div><div class="mbar"></div><div class="mbar"></div></div>
      <span>Succession OST</span>
    </div>
  </nav>

  <div class="main-wrap">

    <!-- HOME -->
    <div class="panel active" id="panel-home">
      <div class="home-eyebrow"><div class="eline"></div>Developer &amp; Creator<div class="eline"></div></div>
      <h1 class="home-title">
        <span class="glitch" data-t="ceyrax"><em>ceyrax</em></span><br>
        builds things.
      </h1>
      <div class="hdiv"></div>
      <p class="home-desc">
        Web siteleri, Discord botları, Roblox scriptleri ve GUI'ler yapan bir <strong>geliştirici</strong>.
        Kod yazmak benim için sanat.
      </p>
      <div class="tag-row">
        <div class="tag">Web Dev</div>
        <div class="tag">Discord Bot</div>
        <div class="tag">Roblox Studio</div>
        <div class="tag">GUI Design</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- SERVICES -->
    <div class="panel" id="panel-services">
      <div class="p-title">Hizmetler</div>
      <div class="p-sub">// ne yapabilirim</div>
      <div class="srv-grid">
        <div class="srv"><span class="srv-icon">🌐</span><div class="srv-name">Web Sitesi</div><div class="srv-text">Modern, hızlı ve şık web siteleri. Landing page'den full-stack projelere kadar.</div><div class="srv-tech">HTML · CSS · JavaScript · React</div></div>
        <div class="srv"><span class="srv-icon">🤖</span><div class="srv-name">Discord Bot</div><div class="srv-text">Moderasyon, müzik, ekonomi ve daha fazlasını içeren güçlü Discord botları.</div><div class="srv-tech">Python · Discord.py · Node.js</div></div>
        <div class="srv"><span class="srv-icon">🎮</span><div class="srv-name">Roblox Script</div><div class="srv-text">Oyun mekaniği, veri saklama, anti-cheat. Temiz ve optimize Lua kodu.</div><div class="srv-tech">Lua · Roblox Studio · DataStore</div></div>
        <div class="srv"><span class="srv-icon">🖥️</span><div class="srv-name">GUI Tasarımı</div><div class="srv-text">Web ve Roblox için akıcı animasyonlu, kullanıcı dostu arayüzler.</div><div class="srv-tech">UI · UX · Roblox GUI · CSS</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ABOUT -->
    <div class="panel" id="panel-about">
      <div class="p-title">Hakkımda</div>
      <div class="p-sub">// kim bu ceyrax</div>
      <div class="about-grid">
        <div>
          <p class="about-p">Ben <strong>ceyrax</strong> — web, Discord, Roblox ve GUI alanlarında çalışan bir geliştirici. Her projeyi bir sanat eseri gibi ele alırım.</p>
          <p class="about-p">Kod yazarken <strong>kalite</strong> ve <strong>hız</strong> arasındaki dengeyi korurum. Müşterimin hayalindekini, bazen hayalinden de güzel yaparım.</p>
          <div class="stats">
            <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n" data-target="50">0</div><div class="stat-l">Proje</div></div>
            <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n" data-target="30">0</div><div class="stat-l">Müşteri</div></div>
            <div class="stat"><div class="stat-n" data-target="3">0</div><div class="stat-l">Yıl</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="sk-rows">
          <div><div class="sk-top"><span class="sk-name">Web Dev</span><span class="sk-pct">90%</span></div><div class="sk-bar"><div class="sk-fill" data-w="90"></div></div></div>
          <div><div class="sk-top"><span class="sk-name">Discord Bot</span><span class="sk-pct">95%</span></div><div class="sk-bar"><div class="sk-fill" data-w="95"></div></div></div>
          <div><div class="sk-top"><span class="sk-name">Roblox / Lua</span><span class="sk-pct">85%</span></div><div class="sk-bar"><div class="sk-fill" data-w="85"></div></div></div>
          <div><div class="sk-top"><span class="sk-name">GUI Design</span><span class="sk-pct">88%</span></div><div class="sk-bar"><div class="sk-fill" data-w="88"></div></div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- STACK -->
    <div class="panel" id="panel-stack">
      <div class="p-title">Tech Stack</div>
      <div class="p-sub">// araçlarım</div>
      <div class="tech-cloud">
        <div class="tech">HTML5</div><div class="tech">CSS3</div><div class="tech">JavaScript</div>
        <div class="tech">React</div><div class="tech">Node.js</div><div class="tech">Python</div>
        <div class="tech">Discord.py</div><div class="tech">Discord.js</div><div class="tech">Lua</div>
        <div class="tech">Roblox Studio</div><div class="tech">Git</div><div class="tech">Figma</div>
        <div class="tech">MongoDB</div><div class="tech">MySQL</div><div class="tech">REST API</div>
        <div class="tech">WebSocket</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- CONTACT -->
    <div class="panel" id="panel-contact">
      <div class="p-title">İletişim</div>
      <div class="p-sub">// ulaş bana</div>
      <div class="contact-wrap">
        <p class="contact-p">Projen var mı? Bana <strong>Discord</strong> veya <strong>Instagram</strong>'dan ulaş. Hızlıca yanıt veririm.</p>
        <div class="soc-list">
          <a class="soc-link" href="https://discord.com/users/ceyraxbaba" target="_blank">
            <div class="soc-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M20.317 4.37a19.791 19.791 0 0 0-4.885-1.515.074.074 0 0 0-.079.037c-.21.375-.444.864-.608 1.25a18.27 18.27 0 0 0-5.487 0 12.64 12.64 0 0 0-.617-1.25.077.077 0 0 0-.079-.037A19.736 19.736 0 0 0 3.677 4.37a.07.07 0 0 0-.032.027C.533 9.046-.32 13.58.099 18.057.1 18.08.114 18.102.13 18.116a19.9 19.9 0 0 0 5.993 3.03.077.077 0 0 0 .084-.028 14.09 14.09 0 0 0 1.226-1.994.076.076 0 0 0-.041-.106 13.107 13.107 0 0 1-1.872-.892.077.077 0 0 1-.008-.128 10.2 10.2 0 0 0 .372-.292.074.074 0 0 1 .077-.01c3.928 1.793 8.18 1.793 12.062 0a.074.074 0 0 1 .078.01c.12.098.246.198.373.292a.077.077 0 0 1-.006.127 12.299 12.299 0 0 1-1.873.892.077.077 0 0 0-.041.107c.36.698.772 1.362 1.225 1.993a.076.076 0 0 0 .084.028 19.839 19.839 0 0 0 6.002-3.03.077.077 0 0 0 .032-.054c.5-5.177-.838-9.674-3.549-13.66a.061.061 0 0 0-.031-.03z"/></svg></div>
            <span class="soc-name">Discord</span><span class="soc-handle">ceyraxbaba</span>
          </a>
          <a class="soc-link" href="https://github.com/CeyraxBaba" target="_blank">
            <div class="soc-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 0C5.374 0 0 5.373 0 12c0 5.302 3.438 9.8 8.207 11.387.599.111.793-.261.793-.577v-2.234c-3.338.726-4.033-1.416-4.033-1.416-.546-1.387-1.333-1.756-1.333-1.756-1.089-.745.083-.729.083-.729 1.205.084 1.839 1.237 1.839 1.237 1.07 1.834 2.807 1.304 3.492.997.107-.775.418-1.305.762-1.604-2.665-.305-5.467-1.334-5.467-5.931 0-1.311.469-2.381 1.236-3.221-.124-.303-.535-1.524.117-3.176 0 0 1.008-.322 3.301 1.23A11.509 11.509 0 0 1 12 5.803c1.02.005 2.047.138 3.006.404 2.291-1.552 3.297-1.23 3.297-1.23.653 1.653.242 2.874.118 3.176.77.84 1.235 1.911 1.235 3.221 0 4.609-2.807 5.624-5.479 5.921.43.372.823 1.102.823 2.222v3.293c0 .319.192.694.801.576C20.566 21.797 24 17.3 24 12c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12z"/></svg></div>
            <span class="soc-name">GitHub</span><span class="soc-handle">CeyraxBaba</span>
          </a>
          <a class="soc-link" href="https://instagram.com/ceyrax" target="_blank">
            <div class="soc-icon"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor"><path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163c0-3.403-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"/></svg></div>
            <span class="soc-name">Instagram</span><span class="soc-handle">ceyrax</span>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- main-wrap -->

  <div class="status"><div class="sdot"></div>Proje Alıyor</div>

</div><!-- #site -->

<audio id="bgm" loop>
  <source src="data:audio/mp4;base64," type="audio/mp4">
</audio>

<script>
/* CANVAS */
const cv=document.getElementById('cv'),cx=cv.getContext('2d');
let W,H,pts=[];
function resize(){W=cv.width=innerWidth;H=cv.height=innerHeight}
resize();addEventListener('resize',resize);
for(let i=0;i<60;i++)pts.push({x:Math.random()*W,y:Math.random()*H,vx:(Math.random()-.5)*.25,vy:(Math.random()-.5)*.25,r:Math.random()*1+.3});
(function draw(){
  cx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
  pts.forEach((p,i)=>{
    p.x+=p.vx;p.y+=p.vy;
    if(p.x<0)p.x=W;if(p.x>W)p.x=0;if(p.y<0)p.y=H;if(p.y>H)p.y=0;
    pts.forEach((q,j)=>{
      if(j<=i)return;
      const dx=p.x-q.x,dy=p.y-q.y,d=Math.sqrt(dx*dx+dy*dy);
      if(d<160){cx.beginPath();cx.moveTo(p.x,p.y);cx.lineTo(q.x,q.y);cx.strokeStyle=`rgba(201,168,76,${(1-d/160)*.07})`;cx.lineWidth=.4;cx.stroke()}
    });
    cx.beginPath();cx.arc(p.x,p.y,p.r,0,Math.PI*2);cx.fillStyle='rgba(201,168,76,.2)';cx.fill();
  });
  requestAnimationFrame(draw);
})();

/* INTRO PARTICLES */
const iparCont=document.getElementById('ipar');
for(let i=0;i<18;i++){
  const d=document.createElement('div');d.className='ipar';
  d.style.cssText=`left:${Math.random()*100}%;animation-duration:${4+Math.random()*6}s;animation-delay:${Math.random()*4}s;animation-play-state:running;opacity:0`;
  iparCont.appendChild(d);
}

/* ENTER */
const enterBtn=document.getElementById('enterBtn');
const intro=document.getElementById('intro');
const site=document.getElementById('site');
const bgm=document.getElementById('bgm');
const mInd=document.getElementById('mInd');

enterBtn.addEventListener('click',()=>{
  bgm.volume=0.4;
  bgm.play().catch(()=>{});
  mInd.classList.add('on');
  intro.classList.add('hidden');
  setTimeout(()=>{site.classList.add('visible')},400);
});

/* NAV */
const tabs=document.querySelectorAll('.ntab');
const panels=document.querySelectorAll('.panel');
let skillsDone=false,countersDone=false;
tabs.forEach(tab=>{
  tab.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    tabs.forEach(t=>t.classList.remove('active'));
    panels.forEach(p=>p.classList.remove('active'));
    tab.classList.add('active');
    const panel=document.getElementById('panel-'+tab.dataset.p);
    panel.classList.add('active');
    if(tab.dataset.p==='about'){
      if(!skillsDone){skillsDone=true;setTimeout(triggerSkills,200)}
      if(!countersDone){countersDone=true;triggerCounters()}
    }
  });
});

function triggerSkills(){
  document.querySelectorAll('.sk-fill').forEach(b=>b.style.width=b.dataset.w+'%');
}
function triggerCounters(){
  document.querySelectorAll('[data-target]').forEach(el=>{
    const t=+el.dataset.target;let c=0;
    const iv=setInterval(()=>{c=Math.min(c+t/50,t);el.textContent=Math.floor(c)+(t>=10?'+':'');if(c>=t)clearInterval(iv)},28);
  });
}
</script>
</body>
</html>
